title: Scyap's Wooly Cow Mod
description: This mod adds Wooly Cow from Minecraft Earth with additional content
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CVonQsfm8y0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Current Milestone Goals:
- **3K views on YouTube:** Release Umbra Cows
- **10K views on YouTube:** Release Snow Covered Variants
- **25K views on YouTube + 100 Mod Downloads:** Release Tan and Indigo Wool Blocks and Carpets

# Mod Information:
This mod adds Wooly Cows from Minecraft Earth with additional features

Features:
- Wooly Cows will naturally spawn in Snowy Plains.
- Wooly Cows act like regular cows, and can be sheared to get brown wool blocks
- Wooly Cows can sometimes play a "shaking" animation.

Content:
- Adds Wooly Cows


This mod will be updated to later versions to update the cow models soon
